transcript.text: Hi there, I'm going to be taking your retinal images today. Have you had this done before?
No worries. It's quick and painless — no drops needed. I'm going to have you look into this camera here. Go ahead and put your chin on the rest and your forehead against the bar.
Almost — scoot in just a little closer. There you go. Now I need you to look straight at the green dot you see inside. Try to keep your eye as wide open as you can.
Perfect. I'm going to take the image now — hold still.
Actually, that one came out a little dark — your eyelid was covering part of the image. Can you open your eye a bit wider this time? I'll have you lift your brow slightly if that helps.
No need to apologize at all, it happens. Okay, same thing — look at the green dot, eye wide open.
Got it — that one looks great. Now let's do your left eye.
